inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per kilogram of the primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per kilogram of the primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi sözleşmelerinden veya piyasa endeksinden alınan ana malzemenin kilogram başına direkt malzeme maliyeti.

inputs.label: Recipe Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşleme kayıplarından (örn. buharlaşma, düzeltme) sonra kullanılabilir çıktı yüzdesi. Geçmiş proses verilerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatör başına saat başına tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti (ücretler, yan haklar ve genel giderler dahil).

inputs.label: Batch Size (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total input weight of the recipe batch before processing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total input weight of the recipe batch before processing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlemeden önce tarif partisinin toplam girdi ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Processing Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total cycle time from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cycle time from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir parti için başlangıçtan bitişe kadar toplam çevrim süresi (karıştırma, ısıtma, soğutma ve paketleme dahil).

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity or thermal energy per kilowatt-hour, based on utility rates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of electricity or thermal energy per kilowatt-hour, based on utility rates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilovat-saat başına ortalama elektrik veya termal enerji maliyeti (tarife oranlarına göre).

inputs.label: Energy Consumption (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Total energy used per batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy used per batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti başına kullanılan toplam enerji (alt sayaçlar veya ekipman etiket değerleri ile ölçülür).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a percentage of direct labor and material costs, following standard cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a percentage of direct labor and material costs, following standard cost accounting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direkt işçilik ve malzeme maliyetlerinin yüzdesi olarak tahsis edilen üretim genel gideri (standart maliyet muhasebesine göre).

rules.message: Recipe yield is below 50% – check process efficiency and material losses.
Quality rework rate exceeds 10% – investigate root cause and implement corrective actions.
Batch size must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Total cost per kg exceeds $50 – review material sourcing and process efficiency.
Yield below 80% – immediate process review required.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
